name: Cape Cod Blueberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour with baking soda, baking powder, salt, and spices.
2. Cream shortening gradually add sugar.
3. Add egg and beat until well blended.
4. Gradually beat in corn syrup and water.
5. Add flour mixture, beating until smooth.
6. Stir in blueberries and cereal.
7. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9-inch square pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 40 - 45 minutes.
9. Serve warm with whipped topping.
